name: xposter
description: Chrome MV3 extension for importing Markdown drafts into X Articles.

scripts.check: node --check src/background.js && node --check src/content.js && node --check src/main-world.js && node --check src/shared.js && node --check src/i18n.js && node --check src/sidepanel-config.js && node --check src/sidepanel-elements.js && node --check src/sidepanel-editor.js && node --check src/sidepanel-messages.js && node --check src/sidepanel-patterns.js && node --check sidepanel.js && node --check diagnostics.js && jq empty manifest.json && node scripts/check-i18n.js
